marketBlueprint.label: Dallas–Fort Worth
marketBlueprint.selectBlurb: A booming Texas Sunbelt metro where country heritage runs deeper than most large markets, AM news/talk/sports big sticks ruled the 1970s dial, and Hispanic FM growth reshapes the book from the 1990s onward. Commercial fragmentation accelerates faster than Deep South gospel clusters — think WBAP/KSCS country lanes, not Atlanta soul dominance.
